report.summary: Cold-start cycle: first standup since 2026-04-04 — 4-day gap, no sibling agents ran this cycle, queue needs reboot

sections.title: Analytics
items: No new analytics pulls since 2026-04-04 19:23 — 4-day data gap in reports/
Last known baseline (v16 standup): organic traffic trending flat, top pages still led by DCA calculator + restaking guide
GSC delta: cannot compute — no intermediate snapshots; recommend fresh pull next build cycle
Action: treat next analytics run as a new baseline rather than a delta

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Carry-over from 2026-04-04 eod-v8: publish queue partially drained, community drafts staged, no open P0 blockers logged
Gap: no build/publish/community/eod reports 2026-04-05 → 2026-04-08 — scheduler appears to have stalled
Open risk: publish queue freshness — pages staged 4 days ago should be re-validated before promotion
Recommend: trigger degen-build-cycle + degen-publish-deploy next hour to restart rotation

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: P1: Restart the agent rotation — investigate why cycles halted after 2026-04-04 and unblock the scheduler
P2: Fresh analytics + GSC baseline so subsequent deltas are meaningful
P3: Re-validate PUBLISH_QUEUE staleness before any promotion; discard or refresh any stale drafts
Strategic flag: 4-day silence on automated rotation is itself a signal — needs devops triage before resuming normal cadence
